news.title: AstraZeneca Pharma India plans to sell a 64-acre Bengaluru site for Rs 3,400 crore.
news.summary: AstraZeneca Pharma India plans to sell a 64-acre Bengaluru site for Rs 3,400 crore.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India gets CDSCO approval for liver cancer drug Imfinzi.
The stock rose 0.3% to ₹8,403 post-announcement; down 6% over the past month.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India gets CDSCO approval for liver cancer drug Imfinzi.
The stock rose 0.3% to ₹8,403 post-announcement; down 6% over the past month.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma gets approval to import Durvalumab for treating unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma.
The approval targets patients without prior systemic treatment for this specific cancer condition.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma gets approval to import Durvalumab for treating unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma.
The approval targets patients without prior systemic treatment for this specific cancer condition.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India (NSE:ASTRAZEN) saw an â‚¹8.0b surge in market cap, benefitting public companies holding 75% of shares.
AstraZeneca PLC owns 75% of shares, while insiders and retail investors own 14b and 11% stakes, respectively.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India (NSE:ASTRAZEN) saw an â‚¹8.0b surge in market cap, benefitting public companies holding 75% of shares.
AstraZeneca PLC owns 75% of shares, while insiders and retail investors own 14b and 11% stakes, respectively.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma's Q3 net profit rose 5.9% to ₹32.6 crore, revenue surged 39% to ₹611.5 crore.
EBITDA fell 41.7% to ₹44.8 crore, with margins dropping to 7.3% from 17.5% YoY.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma's Q3 net profit rose 5.9% to ₹32.6 crore, revenue surged 39% to ₹611.5 crore.
EBITDA fell 41.7% to ₹44.8 crore, with margins dropping to 7.3% from 17.5% YoY.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma shares rose 2.5% after CDSCO approved durvalumab for endometrial cancer treatment.
Durvalumab will be marketed for advanced/recurrent endometrial cancer, pending further statutory approvals.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma shares rose 2.5% after CDSCO approved durvalumab for endometrial cancer treatment.
Durvalumab will be marketed for advanced/recurrent endometrial cancer, pending further statutory approvals.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma received approval to import and sell Durvalumab in India.
The immunotherapy solution enhances AstraZeneca's product portfolio in India.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma received approval to import and sell Durvalumab in India.
The immunotherapy solution enhances AstraZeneca's product portfolio in India.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India receives import permission for Imfinzi, a cancer treatment.
Imfinzi approved for advanced endometrial cancer with combo therapy and maintenance.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India receives import permission for Imfinzi, a cancer treatment.
Imfinzi approved for advanced endometrial cancer with combo therapy and maintenance.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma received CDSCO approval for Imfinzi for treating gastric or gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma.
The stock closed 1.8% higher at ₹8,540, with an 18% gain over the past year.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma received CDSCO approval for Imfinzi for treating gastric or gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma.
The stock closed 1.8% higher at ₹8,540, with an 18% gain over the past year.

news.title: AstraZeneca Pharma gets CDSCO nod for Imfinzi (Durvalumab) for new gastric cancer use.
news.summary: AstraZeneca Pharma gets CDSCO nod for Imfinzi (Durvalumab) for new gastric cancer use.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India to hold board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from Dec 16, 2025, to Feb 13, 2026, as per insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India to hold board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from Dec 16, 2025, to Feb 13, 2026, as per insider trading regulations.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India Ltd announced the resignation of Non-Executive Director Sylvia Lorena Varela Ramon, effective February 28, 2026.
The company expressed appreciation for her contributions. Resignation follows her decision to pursue a career outside the organization.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India Ltd announced the resignation of Non-Executive Director Sylvia Lorena Varela Ramon, effective February 28, 2026.
The company expressed appreciation for her contributions. Resignation follows her decision to pursue a career outside the organization.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India Ltd schedules analyst/investor interactions on Jan 21, 2026.
Meetings include ICICI Prudential AMC and key individuals; subject to change.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India Ltd schedules analyst/investor interactions on Jan 21, 2026.
Meetings include ICICI Prudential AMC and key individuals; subject to change.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India received final tax assessment order for FY 2022-23.
Proposed adjustments on transfer pricing, corporate tax; potential impact Rs. 11.9 crore.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India received final tax assessment order for FY 2022-23.
Proposed adjustments on transfer pricing, corporate tax; potential impact Rs. 11.9 crore.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India gets approval for import, sale, and distribution of Datverzo.
Datverzo, a 100 mg infusion powder, targets specific breast cancer patients post prior therapies.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India gets approval for import, sale, and distribution of Datverzo.
Datverzo, a 100 mg infusion powder, targets specific breast cancer patients post prior therapies.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India shows strong fundamentals with a 25% ROE, outperforming the industry average of 11%.
The company retains 61% of profits, driving 16% net income growth over 5 years and paying dividends for six years.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India shows strong fundamentals with a 25% ROE, outperforming the industry average of 11%.
The company retains 61% of profits, driving 16% net income growth over 5 years and paying dividends for six years.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India's FY 2020-21 tax addition of Rs. 13.11 cr deemed erroneous.
Appeal led to order to delete addition, favorable tax impact estimated at Rs. 3.3 cr.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India's FY 2020-21 tax addition of Rs. 13.11 cr deemed erroneous.
Appeal led to order to delete addition, favorable tax impact estimated at Rs. 3.3 cr.

news.title:
Indian markets poised for flat open after 6-day gains; investors await US data for Fed rate clarity.
Stocks to watch: Blackstone pares Mphasis stake; Elevation Capital sells Paytm shares; AstraZeneca, Sun Pharma pact.
news.summary:
Indian markets poised for flat open after 6-day gains; investors await US data for Fed rate clarity.
Stocks to watch: Blackstone pares Mphasis stake; Elevation Capital sells Paytm shares; AstraZeneca, Sun Pharma pact.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India partners with Sun Pharma to develop hyperkalaemia therapy.
Hyperkalaemia is a condition marked by elevated potassium levels in blood.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India partners with Sun Pharma to develop hyperkalaemia therapy.
Hyperkalaemia is a condition marked by elevated potassium levels in blood.

news.title:
AstraZeneca Pharma India partners with Sun Pharma for Sodium Zirconium Cyclosilicate distribution in India.
Deal includes Rs. 26 crore payment; SZC marketed as Lokelma by AstraZeneca and Gimliand by Sun Pharma.
news.summary:
AstraZeneca Pharma India partners with Sun Pharma for Sodium Zirconium Cyclosilicate distribution in India.
Deal includes Rs. 26 crore payment; SZC marketed as Lokelma by AstraZeneca and Gimliand by Sun Pharma.
